category_sources: source_facts.description says invoice is a command-line invoice generator; official GitHub README says it generates invoices from the command line.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Invoice; source_facts.name is invoice.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official GitHub repository and its README is the official documentation surface for the small CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/maaslalani/invoice, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a command-line invoice generator; official README documents PDF invoice generation, environment variables, config files, and Go installation.
